prompt: Keep the woman EXACTLY as she is in the photo — her face, hair, skin tone, body, pose, hands, and especially her fine NAVY-AND-WHITE PINSTRIPE cotton midi dress — completely unchanged. Do NOT repaint, restyle, or alter her face or identity; treat her as a locked, untouched layer. Keep her feet and the ground fully visible, resting naturally on pale stone paving. Replace ONLY the background. A bright white Cycladic plaster wall. Position a single weathered pale-blue wooden shutter window clearly to the LEFT of her, fully visible and well separated from her body — she must NOT overlap or cross the window at all; she stands against plain clean white wall with open negative space around her. A small sprig of lavender low at the base of the wall. Soft warm Mediterranean daylight matching the existing light on her. Soft realistic contact shadow grounding her. Photographic, editorial, medium-format film look, fine grain, muted natural color, calm slow-fashion mood — a real photograph, never illustration or CGI. Vertical 2:3.
